query: Our sprint ends in 3 days and we have 47 story points remaining. We completed 18 points in the first 7 days.
expected_behavior: Calculates daily velocity from the data: 18 points / 7 days = ~2.57 points/day
Projects remaining time needed: 47 points / 2.57 = ~18 days remaining at current velocity
Flags immediately that the sprint will not complete on time
Recommends specific scope to cut — does not say 'work harder'
Does not suggest adding a meeting to discuss the situation — presents the data and asks which items to cut
